generated_cypher: MATCH (pr:PullRequest {entity_id: 'PR_156018#11659'})-[rel:REFERENCE]->(x:ExternalResource) WHERE rel.service_rel_type = 'LINKS_TO' AND rel.source_event_time >= '2023-01-01T00:00:00Z' AND rel.source_event_time < '2024-01-01T00:00:00Z' RETURN rel.url_domain_etld1, x.entity_id ORDER BY rel.source_event_time DESC LIMIT 20
repaired_cypher: MATCH (pr:PullRequest {entity_id: 'PR_156018#11659'})-[rel:REFERENCE]->(x:ExternalResource) WHERE rel.service_rel_type = 'LINKS_TO' AND rel.source_event_time >= '2023-01-01T00:00:00Z' AND rel.source_event_time < '2024-01-01T00:00:00Z' RETURN rel.url_domain_etld1, count(*) AS c ORDER BY c DESC LIMIT 20
gold_cypher: MATCH (pr:PullRequest {entity_id: 'PR_156018#11659'})-[rel:REFERENCE]->(x:ExternalResource) WHERE rel.service_rel_type = 'LINKS_TO' AND rel.source_event_time >= '2023-01-01T00:00:00Z' AND rel.source_event_time < '2024-01-01T00:00:00Z' RETURN rel.url_domain_etld1, count(*) AS c ORDER BY c DESC LIMIT 20

generated_cypher: MATCH (pr:PullRequest) WHERE pr.entity_id STARTS WITH 'PR_156018' MATCH (pr)-[rl:REFERENCE]->(e:ExternalResource) OPTIONAL MATCH (pr)-[ra:REFERENCE]->(a:Actor) WHERE rl.service_rel_type = 'LINKS_TO' AND (ra IS NULL OR ra.service_rel_type IN ['MENTIONS','REFERENCES']) AND rl.source_event_time >= '2023-01-01T00:00:00Z' AND rl.source_event_time < '2024-01-01T00:00:00Z' RETURN e.url_domain_etld1 AS domain, collect(DISTINCT a.entity_id) AS actors, max(rl.source_event_time) AS latest_time, count(DISTINCT pr.entity_id) AS pr_count ORDER BY pr_count DESC, latest_time DESC LIMIT 30
repaired_cypher: MATCH (pr:PullRequest) WHERE pr.entity_id STARTS WITH 'PR_156018' MATCH (pr)-[rl:REFERENCE]->(e:ExternalResource) OPTIONAL MATCH (pr)-[ra:REFERENCE]->(a:Actor) WHERE rl.service_rel_type = 'LINKS_TO' AND (ra IS NULL OR ra.service_rel_type IN ['MENTIONS','REFERENCES']) AND rl.source_event_time >= '2023-01-01T00:00:00Z' AND rl.source_event_time < '2024-01-01T00:00:00Z' RETURN rl.url_domain_etld1 AS domain, collect(DISTINCT a.entity_id) AS actors, max(rl.source_event_time) AS latest_time, count(DISTINCT pr.entity_id) AS pr_count ORDER BY pr_count DESC, latest_time DESC LIMIT 30
gold_cypher: MATCH (pr:PullRequest) WHERE pr.entity_id STARTS WITH 'PR_156018' MATCH (pr)-[rl:REFERENCE]->(e:ExternalResource) OPTIONAL MATCH (pr)-[ra:REFERENCE]->(a:Actor) WHERE rl.service_rel_type = 'LINKS_TO' AND (ra IS NULL OR ra.service_rel_type IN ['MENTIONS','REFERENCES']) AND rl.source_event_time >= '2023-01-01T00:00:00Z' AND rl.source_event_time < '2024-01-01T00:00:00Z' RETURN rl.url_domain_etld1 AS domain, collect(DISTINCT a.entity_id) AS actors, max(rl.source_event_time) AS latest_time, count(DISTINCT pr.entity_id) AS pr_count ORDER BY pr_count DESC, latest_time DESC LIMIT 30
